title: Property Consultant - Wadhwa Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Wadhwa Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
